29.reason: Missing NULL check: if root is NULL, dereferencing it causes a segmentation fault. The function should first check if(root==NULL) return;

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Missing NULL check: if root is NULL, dereferencing it causes a segmentation fault. The function should first check if(root==NULL) return;

34.reason: This call may pass a NULL pointer when root->left is NULL, causing a segmentation fault inside the recursive call when it tries to access root->left==NULL.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  This call may pass a NULL pointer when root->left is NULL, causing a segmentation fault inside the recursive call when it tries to access root->left==NULL.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Passing NULL pointer to recursive call when root->left is NULL leads to dereferencing NULL in next call]

35.reason: This call may pass a NULL pointer when root->right is NULL, causing a segmentation fault inside the recursive call when it tries to access root->left==NULL.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  This call may pass a NULL pointer when root->right is NULL, causing a segmentation fault inside the recursive call when it tries to access root->left==NULL.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Passing NULL pointer to recursive call when root->right is NULL leads to dereferencing NULL in next call]

38.reason: [The traversal logic incorrectly modifies a shared level counter, causing incorrect height calculation for leaf nodes. The height should be passed by value, not by reference. Also, when root is NULL (e.g., child of a node), the function will dereference a null pointer, leading to runtime error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The traversal logic incorrectly modifies a shared level counter, causing incorrect height calculation for leaf nodes. The height should be passed by value, not by reference. Also, when root is NULL (e.g., child of a node), the function will dereference a null pointer, leading to runtime error.]

49.reason: [Calling search with a NULL root (if n=0) would crash, but more critically, the search function does not handle NULL children safely. When a node has only one child, the recursive call on the NULL child will cause a segmentation fault because the function immediately accesses root->left and root->right without checking if root is NULL.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Calling search with a NULL root (if n=0) would crash, but more critically, the search function does not handle NULL children safely. When a node has only one child, the recursive call on the NULL child will cause a segmentation fault because the function immediately accesses root->left and root->right without checking if root is NULL.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Calling search with root that may be NULL (if n == 0), but more critically, the search function does not check for NULL before accessing root->left/right]
